mapper.insert: insert into goods_price_history (goods_id, old_price, new_price, update_user) values (#{goodsId}, #{oldPrice}, #{newPrice}, #{updateUser})
mapper.select: select h.*, u.real_name as update_user_name, g.goods_name from goods_price_history h left join sys_user u on h.update_user=u.user_id left join goods g on h.goods_id=g.goods_id where h.goods_id=#{goodsId} order by h.update_time desc

select h.*, u.real_name as update_user_name, g.goods_name from goods_price_history h left join sys_user u on h.update_user=u.user_id left join goods g on h.goods_id=g.goods_id order by h.update_time desc
